parameters.query:
WITH input AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE($1::boolean, false) AS auth_valid,
    COALESCE($2::int, 401) AS status_code_in,
    NULLIF(trim(COALESCE($3::text, '')), '') AS message_in,
    NULLIF(lower(trim(COALESCE($4::text, ''))), '') AS email_in,
    NULLIF(trim(COALESCE($5::text, '')), '') AS nombre_google_in,
    NULLIF(trim(COALESCE($6::text, '')), '') AS nombre_form_in,
    NULLIF(trim(COALESCE($7::text, '')), '') AS apellido_form_in
),
prepared AS (
  SELECT
    i.*,
    NULLIF(trim(concat_ws(' ', i.nombre_form_in, i.apellido_form_in)), '') AS nombre_form_full,
    COALESCE(
      NULLIF(trim(concat_ws(' ', i.nombre_form_in, i.apellido_form_in)), ''),
      i.nombre_google_in,
      'Usuario'
    ) AS nombre_preferido
  FROM input i
),
existing AS (
  SELECT u.id, u.email, u.nombre, u.plan_id
  FROM public.usuarios u
  JOIN prepared p ON p.auth_valid = true AND u.email = p.email_in
),
updated_existing AS (
  UPDATE public.usuarios u
  SET nombre = p.nombre_preferido
  FROM prepared p
  WHERE p.auth_valid = true
    AND p.email_in IS NOT NULL
    AND u.email = p.email_in
    AND p.nombre_preferido IS NOT NULL
    AND trim(COALESCE(u.nombre, '')) IS DISTINCT FROM trim(p.nombre_preferido)
  RETURNING u.id, u.email, u.nombre, u.plan_id
),
inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO public.usuarios (nombre, email)
  SELECT COALESCE(p.nombre_preferido, 'Usuario'), p.email_in
  FROM prepared p
  WHERE p.auth_valid = true
    AND p.email_in IS NOT NULL
    AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM existing)
  RETURNING id, email, nombre, plan_id
),
resolved AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE((SELECT id FROM updated_existing LIMIT 1), (SELECT id FROM inserted LIMIT 1), (SELECT id FROM existing LIMIT 1)) AS user_id,
    COALESCE((SELECT email FROM updated_existing LIMIT 1), (SELECT email FROM inserted LIMIT 1), (SELECT email FROM existing LIMIT 1)) AS email,
    COALESCE((SELECT nombre FROM updated_existing LIMIT 1), (SELECT nombre FROM inserted LIMIT 1), (SELECT nombre FROM existing LIMIT 1)) AS nombre,
    COALESCE((SELECT plan_id FROM updated_existing LIMIT 1), (SELECT plan_id FROM inserted LIMIT 1), (SELECT plan_id FROM existing LIMIT 1)) AS plan_id
)
SELECT
  p.auth_valid,
  p.status_code_in,
  p.message_in,
  r.user_id,
  r.email,
  r.nombre,
  NULLIF(trim(regexp_replace(COALESCE(r.nombre, ''), '^[^[:space:]]+[[:space:]]*', '')), '') AS apellido,
  r.plan_id,
  CASE WHEN r.plan_id IS NULL THEN false ELSE true END AS puede_crear_barberia
FROM prepared p
LEFT JOIN resolved r ON true;

    NULLIF(trim(COALESCE($3::text, '')), '') AS message_in,

existing AS (

updated_existing AS (

inserted AS (

resolved AS (

    COALESCE((SELECT nombre FROM updated_existing LIMIT 1), (SELECT nombre FROM inserted LIMIT 1), (SELECT nombre FROM existing LIMIT 1)) AS nombre,
    COALESCE((SELECT plan_id FROM updated_existing LIMIT 1), (SELECT plan_id FROM inserted LIMIT 1), (SELECT plan_id FROM existing LIMIT 1)) AS plan_id
)
SELECT
  p.auth_valid,
  p.status_code_in,
  p.message_in,
  r.user_id,
  r.email,
  r.nombre,
  NULLIF(trim(regexp_replace(COALESCE(r.nombre, ''), '^[^[:space:]]+[[:space:]]*', '')), '') AS apellido,
  r.plan_id,
  CASE WHEN r.plan_id IS NULL THEN false ELSE true END AS puede_crear_barberia
FROM prepared p
LEFT JOIN resolved r ON true;
